codeReview.summary: The feature logic is implemented in src/relay/server.ts and covered by new tests, but a blocking integration gap remains: the new ContactStore dependency is not wired into production relay options, so the first-contact policy routes/annotations are inactive in real relay startup.

issues.description: createProductionServerOptions() returns tokenVerifier/participantStore/messageStore/accountStore but does not provide contactStore. Because server contact routes and message annotations are guarded by `&& contactStore` (src/relay/server.ts:582,609,636,717,755), production relay instances started via src/relay/index.ts do not activate VAL-RELAY-012/013 behavior (contact approval APIs and autonomy gating annotations).

Coverage only exercises createRelayServer with manually injected contactStore (also at lines 304 and 475). There is no production-wiring assertion using createProductionServerOptions, which allowed the missing index.ts wiring regression to pass tests.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure requires manual CLI/API/SSE sanity checks for user-facing changes (or explicit rationale for skipping), but this handoff marks followedProcedure=true without interactiveChecks or skip rationale.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill step 8 in .factory/skills/mors-global-worker/SKILL.md requires manual checks/rationale; handoff file 2026-03-01T00-07-27-624Z__autonomy-first-contact-pending-policy__c82500ef-3012-4d94-9255-e7a7bd1e59e4.json includes verification.commandsRun only and no interactiveChecks section.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mission convention about wiring new relay dependencies into src/relay/index.ts exists, but there is no durable test convention documented in shared library docs to enforce it for every new dependency.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md line 39 documents the wiring rule; entrypoint wiring tests currently assert messageStore/tokenVerifier but not new dependencies like contactStore (test/relay/entrypoint-wiring.test.ts:100-118).

summary: Review failed due to a blocking production integration miss: contact policy code is present but not wired into createProductionServerOptions, leaving first-contact routes/annotations inactive in real relay startup. Unit/integration tests added in this feature are otherwise thorough but do not include production wiring coverage for the new dependency.
